infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Beacon5 captures your location only when you activate the emergency beacon, so staff and your guardian can find you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Beacon5 keeps tracking your location while the emergency beacon is active even if your screen is locked, so staff and your guardian can reach you during an emergency.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Beacon5 captures your location only when you activate the emergency beacon.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Beacon5 keeps tracking your location while the emergency beacon is active even if your screen is locked.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Beacon5 keeps tracking your location while the emergency beacon is active even if your screen is locked.
